response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 17 years of broad engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial exposure, which satisfies the baseline tenure requirement, but the role centers on recognized AI expertise and director-level strategic influence that the resume does not demonstrate. AI involvement appears only in the most recent role (two months) as an MCP tooling contributor, with no evidence of having built AI-powered products at scale, advised enterprise customers on AI adoption, or shaped organizational AI strategy.
strengths: 17+ years of continuous professional software engineering across diverse domains and stacks
Founder experience (GISCollective) and a recurring pattern of open-source platform building demonstrate entrepreneurial initiative
Active knowledge-sharer through workshops and conference talks, relevant to the role's internal/external inspiration mandate
concerns: AI/ML depth is negligible — the only AI work listed is two months of MCP tooling at a current role, with no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale
Seniority gap is significant — current and past titles are Senior/Staff Developer, with no evidence of director-level scope, strategic customer engagement, or cross-org technical leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no cloud platform architecture experience at the level the role expects
